THOMAS KOSTER IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO LISA NAGELS AND AMY THORNES 1 PETITION TO CONFIRM A CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS, AND 2 MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE COURTS FEBRUARY 9, 2021 FEES AND COSTS AWARD IN FAVOR OF ALLEN AND LAVELLE (TRANSACTION ID # 100215936) FILED BY PETITIONER ALLEN, KENT LAVELLE, JANE

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF HEARING OF LISA NAGEL?S AND AMY THORNE?S (1) PETITION TO CONFIRM A CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS? FEES AND COSTS, AND (2) MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE COURT?S FEBRUARY 9, 2021 FEES AND COSTS AWARD IN FAVOR OF ALLEN AND LAVELLE IS MOOT. THE AWARD HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL. MOVING PARTY FAILS TO EXPLAIN ITS ENTITLEMENT TO DAILY INTEREST AT THE RATE OF $27.59 PER DAY FROM SEPTEMBER 21, 2023 TO OCTOBER 4, 2023 HAVING ADMITTED THAT THE PRINCIPAL HAD BEEN PAID OFF ON SEPTEMBER 21, 2023. REQUEST FOR FEES AND COSTS INCURRED FOR BRINGING THIS MOTION IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT REQUESTED. THE PAYMENT OF THE PRINCIPAL AND INTEREST WAS MADE AFTER THE FILING OF THE MOTION. FEBRUARY 9, 2021 ORDER IS SET ASIDE AND THE MOVING PARTY IS ENTITLE TO REFUND OF ANY PAYMENTS MADE THERE ON. THE JUDGEMENT ROLL INDICATES THAT THERE WAS NO VALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AT THE TIME OF THE FEBRUARY 9, 2021 HEARING. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; REPORTED: SUSAN YIP; CSR# 5038; 415-412-1678; SUSANYIP@GMAIL.COM (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Lisa Nagel?S And Amy Thorne?S (1) Petition To Confirm A Contractual Arbitration Award And Request For Attorneys? Fees And Costs, And (2) Motion To Set Aside The Court?S February 9, 2021 Fees And Costs Award In Favor Of Allen And Lavelle
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Thomas Koster 415-713-8680 of Koster & Leadbetter appearing via Zoom for plaintiff.
Curtis F. Dowling 415-977-0444 of Dowling & Marquez appearing via Zoom for defendant.
Reporter: Susan Yip; CSR# 5038; 415-412-1678; susanyip@gmail.com

Hearing held (See reporter's transcript for full details). Mr. Koster contests tentative ruling. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

NOTICE OF HEARING OF LISA NAGEL'S AND AMY THORNE'S (1) PETITION TO CONFIRM A CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS, AND (2) MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE COURT'S FEBRUARY 9, 2021 FEES AND COSTS AWARD IN FAVOR OF ALLEN AND LAVELLE is moot. The award has been paid in full. Moving party fails to explain its entitlement to daily interest at the rate of $27.59 per day from September 21, 2023 to October 4, 2023 having admitted that the principal had been paid off on September 21, 2023. Request for fees and costs incurred for bringing this motion is granted in the amount requested. The payment of the principal and interest was made after the filing of the motion. February 9, 2021 order is set aside and the moving party is entitle to refund of any payments made there on. The judgement roll indicates that there was no valid proof of service on file at the time of the February 9, 2021 hearing.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Reported: Susan Yip; CSR# 5038; 415-412-1678; susanyip@gmail.com (D501)

Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioners Kent Allen and Jane LaVelle's Petition To Compel Arbitration:
Grant. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
